labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Domscan Net Mcp Domain Checker" provides 46 tools focused on dns & networking tasks. Core capabilities include analysis and computation, creation and generation, data access and reading, modification and updates. Key tools: get_status, bulk_status, coverage, suggest_domains, domain_valuation.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "DNS & Networking" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: dns, domain, nameserver.
labels.custom_label: Data Access - Domscan Net Mcp Domain Checker
labels.tool_verified_reason: auth error in response: {"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 12968, "error": {"code": -32001, "message": "Authentication required. Provi

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Check if a domain name is available across multiple TLDs. The "name" parameter is the domain label WITHOUT the TLD (e.g., "google" not "google.com"). The "tlds" parameter is an array of TLD extensions. (costs 1 credit)

name.description: Domain label WITHOUT TLD. Example: "google" or "myapp"

prefer_cache.description: Prefer cached results for faster response

tools.name: bulk_status
tools.description: Check multiple complete domain names at once. Each domain must include the TLD (e.g., "google.com"). (1 credit base + 0.5 credits per item)

domains.description: Array of complete domain names. Example: ["google.com","facebook.net"]

tools.name: coverage
tools.description: Get information about which TLDs are supported by this API. (costs 1 credit)

live.description: Perform live health checks on RDAP servers

tools.name: suggest_domains
tools.description: Generate domain name suggestions based on keywords. Great for brainstorming available domains. (costs 2 credits)

keywords.description: Keywords to generate suggestions for (e.g., "coffee shop")

tlds.description: TLDs to check (default: com, io, ai, co, app)

language.description: Language for suggestions (default: en). Supports 30 languages.

tools.name: domain_valuation
tools.description: Estimate the market value of a domain name based on length, keywords, TLD, brandability, and market factors. (costs 1 credit)

tools.name: domain_health
tools.description: Run comprehensive health checks on a domain including DNS, SSL, redirects, and web server status. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: compare_domains
tools.description: Compare multiple domains side-by-side. Returns availability, valuation, brand score, and recommendations. (costs 2 credits)

domains.description: Array of complete domain names to compare. Example: ["startup.com","startup.io","startup.ai"]

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Lookup DNS records for a domain. Returns A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, and other record types. (costs 1 credit)

domain.description: Domain to lookup DNS records for (e.g., "example.com")

type.description: Specific record type to query (optional, returns all if not specified)

tools.name: dns_security
tools.description: Analyze DNS security configuration including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, DNSSEC, and CAA records. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: dns_propagation
tools.description: Check DNS propagation across multiple global DNS servers. (costs 2 credits)

type.description: DNS record type to check (default: A)

tools.name: reverse_ns_lookup
tools.description: Find domains that use a specific nameserver. Useful for discovering related domains and infrastructure analysis. (costs 1 credit)

tools.name: dns_history
tools.description: Get DNS record history for a domain showing how records have changed over time. (costs 2 credits)

domain.description: Domain to get DNS history for (e.g., "example.com")

type.description: Filter by record type (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, etc.)

tools.name: dns_diff
tools.description: Compare DNS records between two dates to identify what changed. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: spf_build
tools.description: Build an SPF record from configuration options. (costs 1 credit)

a.description: Domains whose A records are authorized

mx.description: Domains whose MX records are authorized

tools.name: spf_validate
tools.description: Validate an SPF record syntax and check for common issues. (costs 1 credit)

domain.description: Domain to fetch and validate SPF for

record.description: SPF record string to validate directly

tools.name: spf_flatten
tools.description: Flatten an SPF record by resolving includes to IP addresses. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: dmarc_build
tools.description: Build a DMARC record from configuration options. (costs 1 credit)

percentage.description: Percentage of messages to apply policy (1-100)

tools.name: dmarc_validate
tools.description: Validate a DMARC record syntax and configuration. (costs 1 credit)

domain.description: Domain to fetch and validate DMARC for

record.description: DMARC record string to validate directly

tools.name: dkim_check
tools.description: Check a DKIM selector and validate the public key record. (costs 1 credit)

tools.name: dkim_discover
tools.description: Discover DKIM selectors by checking common selector names. (costs 2 credits)

domain.description: Domain to discover DKIM selectors for

tools.name: typosquatting_check
tools.description: Detect potential typosquatting domains for a given domain and check which are registered. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: protection_score
tools.description: Calculate how vulnerable a domain is to typosquatting attacks. Returns a protection score and recommendations. (costs 1 credit)

check_registered.description: Check registered typos to factor into score (slower)

tools.name: domain_reputation
tools.description: Calculate a comprehensive reputation/trust score for a domain based on DNS security, SSL, web presence, email configuration, and other factors. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: search_certificates
tools.description: Search Certificate Transparency logs to find all SSL certificates issued for a domain. Useful for discovering subdomains, monitoring certificate issuance, and security auditing. (costs 2 credits)

limit.description: Maximum number of certificates to return (default: 100, max: 1000)

tools.name: ssl_grade
tools.description: Analyze SSL/TLS configuration for a domain and get a letter grade with detailed scoring. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: ssl_chain
tools.description: Get certificate chain details including issuer, validity dates, and trust chain. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: ssl_expiring
tools.description: Check if a domain SSL certificate is expiring soon. (costs 1 credit)

tools.name: enumerate_subdomains
tools.description: Discover subdomains for a domain using Certificate Transparency logs. Useful for attack surface mapping and security reconnaissance. (costs 3 credits)

verify.description: Verify subdomains resolve via DNS (slower but more accurate)

tools.name: email_security
tools.description: Check email authentication configuration (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) for a domain. (costs 2 credits)

domain.description: Domain to check email security for (e.g., "example.com")

tools.name: verify_email
tools.description: Verify if an email address is real and deliverable. Checks syntax, MX records, disposable domains, and optionally SMTP mailbox existence. (1 credit; With full=true (SMTP verification), costs 5 credits total)

full.description: Enable full SMTP verification for 5 credits total (default: false)

tools.name: tech_stack
tools.description: Detect technologies used by a website including CMS, frameworks, analytics, hosting, and security tools. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: company_lookup
tools.description: Lookup company/organization information associated with a domain. Extracts data from website meta tags, WHOIS, and other public sources. (costs 2 credits)

domain.description: Domain to lookup company information for (e.g., "example.com")

tools.name: hosting_detection
tools.description: Detect hosting provider, CDN, WAF, DNS provider, and email infrastructure for a domain. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: parking_detection
tools.description: Check if a domain is parked, showing placeholder/ad pages, or listed for sale on aftermarket platforms like Sedo, Afternic, Dan.com, etc. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: ip_lookup
tools.description: Get detailed information about an IP address or domain, including geolocation, ASN, network info, and security indicators. (costs 1 credit)

domain.description: Domain name to resolve and lookup (alternative to ip)

tools.name: lookup_mac
tools.description: Lookup MAC address metadata and vendor/OUI information. (costs 1 credit)

tools.name: reverse_mx_lookup
tools.description: Find domains that use a specific mail server. Useful for discovering related domains. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: reverse_ip_lookup
tools.description: Find domains hosted on a specific IP address. Useful for discovering co-hosted sites. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: domain_graph
tools.description: Build a relationship graph showing connections between domains via shared IPs, nameservers, mail servers, and registrant info. (costs 3 credits)

seed.description: Domain or IP to analyze connections for (e.g., "example.com")

include.description: Relationship types to include: ns, mx, ip, asn, registrant (CSV)

tools.name: whois_lookup
tools.description: Get WHOIS/RDAP registration data for a domain including registrar, dates, nameservers, and status. (costs 2 credits)

domain.description: Domain to lookup WHOIS data for (e.g., "example.com")

tools.name: whois_history
tools.description: Get historical WHOIS snapshots showing how registration data has changed over time, including registrar transfers, nameserver changes, and privacy toggles. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: domain_lifecycle
tools.description: Get domain lifecycle information including registration date, expiration date, domain age, days until expiry, and current lifecycle phase. (costs 2 credits)

tools.name: social_handles
tools.description: Check availability of a username across major social media platforms. (costs 2 credits)

platforms.description: Platforms to check (default: all major platforms)

tools.name: list_tlds
tools.description: List all supported TLDs with optional filtering by type or trust tier. (costs 1 credit)

use_case.description: Get TLDs for a specific use case. Example: "startup" or "tech"

tools.name: tld_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a TLD including pricing, restrictions, trust score, and use cases. (costs 1 credit)

tld.description: TLD to get info for. Example: "io" or "com"

tools.name: metrics
tools.description: Get API performance statistics. (costs 0 credits)
